creator: sobomax@altavista.net
text:
Hi,

pkg/DESC also need to be updated like this:

--- /usr/ports/misc/less/pkg/DESCR Mon Nov 16 14:57:44 1998
+++ less/pkg/DESCR Fri Aug 20 12:38:35 1999
@@ -1,2 +1,4 @@
 This is the distribution of "less", a paginator similar to "more" or
"pg",
 but much more powerful.
+
+WWW: http://www.flash.net/~marknu/less
